title: evolvulus flavus
intro: Evolvulus flavus, also known as dwarf morning glory, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Evolvulus flavus can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
